chunks.title: Call to Universal Praise
chunks.reason: The psalmist invites all the earth to shout and sing praises to God for His mighty works.

chunks.title: Testimony of Deliverance
chunks.reason: The speaker recounts how God tested and refined the people, bringing them through fire and water to abundance.

chunks.title: Vow of Sacrifice
chunks.reason: The psalmist promises to fulfill vows with burnt offerings and sacrifices in God's house.

chunks.title: Personal Testimony of Prayer
chunks.reason: The speaker invites others to hear how God heard his prayer and did not turn away His lovingkindness.
